Title: The Boys & Girls Guide to Getting Down
Keywords: single, club, nightclub, singles, 2000s
Date Published: 2007-03-23
IMDb Rating: 6.6/10 from 2488 users
IMDb Link: https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0464907/
Directors: Paul Sapiano
Creators: Paul Sapiano / Greg Studley / Nik Venet
Actors: Cricket Leigh / Kat Turner / John McGarr

Introduction
    Part documentary, part narrative, part instructional format, this film aims to teach young inexperienced youth about all things involved with "getting down", while also pointing out some of the pitfalls associated with the party life

Filming locations: Beauty Bar - 1638 North Cahuenga Boulevard, Hollywood, Los Angeles, California, USA
